1.error: scale 1 slightly overstated — T1 is a heavy-braking ~90° right, not a true hairpin; 2 is more accurate

2.error: scale 4 too fast — T2 is a medium-speed left taken in sequence with T1/T3; 3 fits better

6.error: corner coordinate appears ~60m late — the rightward bend apexes nearer [50.5159, 26.0330]; marker 0.36 likely closer to 0.35

7.error: corner 7 direction should be left not right — centerline bearing swings counterclockwise (~278° to ~220°) through this section; coordinate also looks ~60m past the actual bend

8.error: corner point [50.51309, 26.032017] sits ~50m north of the actual apex (~26.0315), on the corner exit; also scale 1 is slightly harsh — it's a tight right but not a full hairpin

11.error: scale 4 a touch fast — T11 is a long medium-speed left where the car is loaded for a long time; 3 fits better

14.error: scale 3 too fast — T14 is a slow heavy-braking right onto the run to the final kink; 2 is more accurate

gp.errors_summary: Turn 7 direction is wrong (should be left, not right); T6/T7/T8 corner coordinates appear shifted ~50-90m past their actual apexes; minor severity-scale adjustments on T1, T2, T11, T14
